The changes are: (1) move 'Id.' from after the closing quote to before the parenthetical; (2) change 'Detailed Id.' to 'Detailed findings,' within the quote; (3) change ' Id. findings,' to ' Id.' at the end. Both strings are exactly 260 characters, enabling a byte-for-byte replacement.
note: This is a significant structural error in how the quoted material is formatted and attributed. The parenthetical citation reference '(alteration in original)' should follow 'Id.', not precede the quote.
